must_detect.matched_text:
Transaction: Subscription of new shares (19.9%) and secondary purchase (10.0%) from Blue Lattice Technology Limited (selling shareholder) for an aggregate post-closing holding of 29.9%.
Price and consideration: HKD 4.20 per share, payable in cash at completion; any adjustment is price-sensitive and subject to applicable inside information restrictions.
Regulatory: Company to make announcement under Part XIVA of the Securities and Futures Ordinance and the Listing Rules upon signing; Takeovers Code not triggered as post-closing stake remains below 30%.
Conditions precedent: Receipt of all necessary confirmations from the Hong Kong stock exchange and securities regulator, shareholder approvals (if required), no MAC, and completion of confirmatory due diligence.
MNPI handling: Specific, non-public and price-sensitive information to be ring-fenced in the VDR; Investor acknowledges obligations under inside information provisions and the Company’s disclosure controls and procedures.
Key person: Mr. Adrian Tse (CTO) is critical to AuroraPay and Nimbus ERP product lines; he has a documented Type 1 diabetes treatment plan and a registered facial-recognition access template for the Quarry Bay data lab; consents obtained under the PDPO for VDR disclosure.
Employee representation: Ms. Celia Lau (Head of Operations) is a member of the Harbour Tech Workers’ Union and observes Buddhist religious holidays; the Buyer will honour union facility time and reasonable accommodation post-closing.
Data protection: PDPO-compliant notices and consents for all personal data in the VDR, including special-category data as above; no onward transfer of personal data outside Hong Kong without prior written approval.
Post-closing covenants: Investor board seat; standstill at 29.9% for 18 months; non-solicitation of employees for 12 months; customary restrictive covenants.
Financing: Equity from Orchid Peak Capital Fund I and a vendor loan from Blue Lattice Technology Limited at 6.5% p.a.; no margin lending or pledged shares permitted.
Announcements and communications: Bilingual announcement draft within 5 business days of signing; no reference to sports sponsorships (including the Kowloon Kites) until completion to avoid speculative rumours.
Interpretation aids: The deal is a lighthouse for future capital deployment, but metaphors do not modify risk factors; product code-names (AuroraPay, Nimbus ERP, DragonShield) are internal tags only.
DEI policy: The Company’s Inclusive Workforce Charter 2026 references religion, sexual orientation, and gender identity in general; this policy language is non-individual and does not describe any person.
Assets and locations: Assets include the Tsim Sha Tsui showroom and the Quarry Bay data lab; no land premium issues; Investor will comply with the Fund Manager Code of Conduct where relevan
